name: atlas-cli-workflows
description: Focused Atlas CLI workflow eval cases.

cases.query: When should a maintainer run atlas init and what repo-local files does it prepare?
cases.claim: Atlas retrieves CLI workflow docs for command-line user journeys.
cases.whyItMatters: The CLI is the main local surface and must be discoverable from user-like queries.
cases.expectedBehavior: Retrieve the expected source paths and terms while satisfying any negative, diagnostic, confidence, and hit-count expectations.
